ai_systems.name: FaceGate Access Control
ai_systems.description: Facial recognition system for building access control at corporate offices. Matches live camera feeds against an enrolled employee database to grant or deny physical access.
ai_systems.purpose: Automated building access control using biometric verification to replace badge-only entry systems.
ai_systems.risk_tier_rationale: Biometric identification system classified as high-risk under EU AI Act Annex III, Category 1.
ai_systems.data_inputs: Live camera feeds (RGB), enrolled employee facial images, access event logs
ai_systems.training_data_sources: Proprietary dataset of 50,000 facial images (synthetic and licensed stock photography), augmented with pose/lighting variations
ai_systems.human_oversight: Security desk personnel review all access denials in real-time. Manual override available at all entry points. Weekly accuracy audits by security team.
ai_systems.bias_testing_results: Tested across demographic groups (age, gender, skin tone). False rejection rate variance: 0.3% across groups. No disparate impact identified per four-fifths rule.
ai_systems.transparency_measures: Signage at all entry points notifying of facial recognition. Employee handbook section on biometric data usage. Opt-out process (badge-only alternative) available.

ai_systems.name: ResumeRank Candidate Screener
ai_systems.description: NLP-based system that scores and ranks job application resumes against job description requirements. Produces a shortlist recommendation for hiring managers.
ai_systems.purpose: Accelerate initial resume screening by automatically scoring candidates on skills match, experience relevance, and qualification alignment.
ai_systems.risk_tier_rationale: AI used in recruitment and candidate selection is high-risk under Annex III, Category 4 (Employment, workers management).
ai_systems.data_inputs: Resume PDFs/DOCXs, job description text, historical hiring outcomes (anonymized)
ai_systems.training_data_sources: 10,000 anonymized resume-outcome pairs from past 3 years of hiring at SynthCorp, supplemented with public job posting datasets
ai_systems.human_oversight: Hiring managers review all shortlists before any candidate is contacted. System produces scores as recommendations only. Quarterly bias audits.
ai_systems.transparency_measures: Candidate privacy notice discloses AI-assisted screening. Score explanations available to hiring managers showing top contributing factors.

ai_systems.name: GridSense Demand Forecaster
ai_systems.description: Machine learning model that predicts electricity demand across regional grid segments to optimize power generation scheduling and prevent brownouts.
ai_systems.purpose: Forecast electricity demand 24-72 hours ahead to enable efficient power plant scheduling and reduce over/under-generation costs.
ai_systems.risk_tier_rationale: AI used in management of critical infrastructure (electricity grid) is high-risk under Annex III, Category 2.
ai_systems.data_inputs: Historical demand data, weather forecasts, calendar/holiday data, industrial activity indicators, real-time grid telemetry
ai_systems.training_data_sources: 5 years of regional grid demand data (public utility records), NOAA weather archives, synthetic anomaly scenarios
ai_systems.human_oversight: Grid operators review and can override all generation schedules. Automated alerts when predicted vs. actual demand diverges by >5%. Manual dispatch always available.
ai_systems.bias_testing_results: Not applicable — system predicts aggregate demand, not individual-level decisions.
ai_systems.transparency_measures: Model performance dashboards accessible to grid operators. Monthly accuracy reports published to regulatory authority.

ai_systems.name: SupportBot Pro
ai_systems.description: Customer-facing chatbot handling first-line support queries for a SaaS product. Uses LLM to understand questions and retrieve answers from a knowledge base.
ai_systems.purpose: Reduce support ticket volume by answering common customer questions automatically, escalating complex issues to human agents.
ai_systems.risk_tier_rationale: Chatbot interacting with natural persons is subject to transparency obligations under Article 52 (limited risk).
ai_systems.data_inputs: Customer chat messages, product knowledge base articles, historical support tickets (anonymized)
ai_systems.training_data_sources: Product documentation, 20,000 anonymized support ticket Q&A pairs, curated FAQ dataset
ai_systems.human_oversight: Live agent escalation available at any time. All conversations logged and reviewed weekly. Confidence threshold — queries below 70% confidence auto-escalate.
ai_systems.bias_testing_results: Not applicable — support responses are product-specific, not demographic-sensitive.
ai_systems.transparency_measures: Chat window clearly labeled 'You are chatting with an AI assistant.' Persistent option to 'Talk to a human' in every interaction.

ai_systems.name: ContentCurate Recommender
ai_systems.description: Recommendation engine suggesting internal knowledge-base articles to employees based on their role, recent searches, and document access patterns.
ai_systems.purpose: Improve employee productivity by surfacing relevant internal documentation proactively.
ai_systems.risk_tier_rationale: Internal content recommendation does not fall under any Annex III category. Classified as minimal risk.
ai_systems.data_inputs: Employee role metadata, document access logs, search query history (aggregated)
ai_systems.training_data_sources: 6 months of anonymized document access patterns, role-to-content affinity matrix (synthetic)
ai_systems.human_oversight: Employees can dismiss or flag irrelevant recommendations. Monthly review of recommendation quality metrics by knowledge management team.
ai_systems.transparency_measures: Tooltip on each recommendation explaining 'Suggested because of your role and recent activity.' Settings page to opt out.

ai_systems.name: LegacyVision OCR Pipeline
ai_systems.description: Optical character recognition pipeline that digitizes scanned paper contracts and extracts key metadata fields (dates, parties, values).
ai_systems.purpose: Automate digitization of legacy paper contract archives to enable searchable contract repository.
ai_systems.risk_tier_rationale: Document OCR and metadata extraction is a general-purpose application not covered by Annex III. Minimal risk.
ai_systems.data_inputs: Scanned contract images (TIFF/PDF), document metadata from filing system
ai_systems.training_data_sources: 5,000 synthetic contract images generated from templates with varied fonts, scan quality, and layouts
ai_systems.human_oversight: All extracted metadata reviewed by legal ops team before import into contract management system. Confidence scores shown per field.
ai_systems.bias_testing_results: Not applicable — system processes document images, not personal data.
ai_systems.transparency_measures: Extraction confidence scores displayed per field. Source scan image always viewable alongside extracted data.
